_comment: Operator-asserted GICS sector classifications — verifiable facts a live source cannot reach in this environment, NOT guesses. Each row names an exact security by composite_figi and the authoritative reason. Reviewable artifact: a wrong call is a one-line edit + `sym classify`. source='manual'; sector-only; fill-only; high precedence among fills (operator facts beat automated guesses, below the financedatabase primary). Sector must be one of the 11 GICS sectors.

classifications.name: Scottish Mortgage Investment Trust PLC
classifications.rationale: FTSE-100 closed-end investment trust; FTSE/ICB and GICS both classify investment trusts as Financials. Operator-asserted because yahoo_profile (SMT.L) returns HTTP 404 in the sim env and Wikidata has no entity match; production yahoo_profile would classify it Financials.

classifications.name: Polar Capital Technology Trust PLC
classifications.rationale: FTSE-100 closed-end investment trust; FTSE/ICB and GICS classify investment trusts as Financials. Operator-asserted (yahoo_profile PCT.L → 404 in-env, Wikidata no match).

classifications.name: Alliance Witan PLC
classifications.rationale: FTSE-100 closed-end investment trust (Alliance Trust + Witan merged 2024); FTSE/ICB and GICS classify investment trusts as Financials. Operator-asserted (yahoo_profile ALW.L → 404 in-env, Wikidata no match).
